actual.title: Client Presentation (Virtual)
actual.description:
Q1 results presentation for ABC Corp

Meeting moved to Zoom. Client requested virtual format. Same agenda.

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Client Presentation
- Start: 2026-03-25T10:00:00
- End: 2026-03-25T11:30:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Client office - 789 Business Plaza
- Description: Q1 results presentation for ABC Corp
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: update):**
- Title: Client Presentation (Virtual)
- Start: 2026-03-25T10:00:00
- End: 2026-03-25T11:30:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Zoom: https://zoom.us/j/123456789
- Description: Meeting moved to Zoom. Client requested virtual format. Same agenda.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}

trace.raw_response_text:
{
    "title": "Client Presentation (Virtual)",

    "location": "Zoom: https://zoom.us/j/123456789",

    "importance": "action_required"
}
